guardrails: W1.5.219 converts the 11 W1.5.218 needs_followup blocker decisions into scoped follow-up plan items only.
No follow-up item is accepted, implemented, completed, ready, or eligible for FR closure in this slice.
W1.5.219 does not modify runtime behavior, Desktop production behavior, accepted specs, ADR status, schemas, generated schemas, dependencies, packaging, updater work, or baseline docx files.

Evidence and plan fields remain metadata-only and must not contain prompt text, model output, uploaded-file bytes, instruction text, HITL prompt content, custom decision values, response bodies, artifact bodies, secure paths, cache paths, output directory values, full destination paths, credentials, raw file content, or staged user file content.
FR-015 remains excluded while ADR-0012 is Proposed.
accepted_items and implemented_items remain zero; EXIT-P1-1 and EXIT-P1-10 remain not_ready.
